verses.latin_vulgate: Factum est autem, cum quadam die venissent filii Dei, et starent coram Domino, venisset quoque Satan inter eos, et staret in conspectu ejus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֣י הַיּ֔וֹם וַיָּבֹ֙אוּ֙ בְּנֵ֣י הָאֱלֹהִ֔ים לְהִתְיַצֵּ֖ב עַל־יְהֹוָ֑ה וַיָּב֤וֹא גַֽם־הַשָּׂטָן֙ בְּתֹכָ֔ם לְהִתְיַצֵּ֖ב עַל־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it came to pass, when on a certain day the sons of God came, and stood before the Lord, and Satan came amongst them, and stood in his sight,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tapahtui yhtenä päivänä, kuin Jumalan lapset tulivat ja astuivat Herran eteen, että saatana myös tuli heidän kanssansa ja astui Herran eteen.
verses.king_james: Again there was a day when the sons of God came to present themselves before the Lord, and Satan came also among them to present himself before the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: ut diceret Dominus ad Satan : Unde venis ? Qui respondens ait : Circuivi terram, et perambulavi eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יְהֹוָה֙ אֶל־הַשָּׂטָ֔ן אֵ֥י מִזֶּ֖ה תָּבֹ֑א וַיַּ֨עַן הַשָּׂטָ֤ן אֶת־יְהֹוָה֙ וַיֹּאמַ֔ר מִשֻּׁ֣ט בָּאָ֔רֶץ וּמֵֽהִתְהַלֵּ֖ךְ בָּֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: That the Lord said to Satan: Whence comest thou? And he answered, and said: I have gone round about the earth, and walked through it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin sanoi Herra saatanalle: kusta tulet? Saatana vastasi Herraa ja sanoi: minä olen käynyt ja vaeltanut ympäri maan.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto Satan, From whence comest thou? And Satan answered the Lord, and said, From going to and fro in the earth, and from walking up and down in it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit Dominus ad Satan : Numquid considerasti servum meum Job, quod non sit ei similis in terra, vir simplex et rectus, ac timens Deum, et recedens a malo, et adhuc retinens innocentiam ? tu autem commovisti me adversus eum, ut affligerem eum frustra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יְהֹוָ֜ה אֶל־הַשָּׂטָ֗ן הֲשַׂ֣מְתָּ לִבְּךָ֮ אֶל־עַבְדִּ֣י אִיּוֹב֒ כִּי֩ אֵ֨ין כָּמֹ֜הוּ בָּאָ֗רֶץ אִ֣ישׁ תָּ֧ם וְיָשָׁ֛ר יְרֵ֥א אֱלֹהִ֖ים וְסָ֣ר מֵרָ֑ע וְעֹדֶ֙נּוּ֙ מַחֲזִ֣יק בְּתֻמָּת֔וֹ וַתְּסִיתֵ֥נִי ב֖וֹ לְבַלְּע֥וֹ חִנָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to Satan: Hast thou considered my servant, Job, that there is none like him in the earth, a man simple and upright, and fearing God, and avoiding evil, and still keeping his innocence? But thou hast moved me against him, that I should afflict him without cause.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra sanoi saatanalle: etkös ole ottanut vaaria palveliastani Jobista? sillä ei hänen vertaistansa ole maalla: hän on vakaa ja hurskas ja Jumalaa pelkääväinen mies, ja välttää pahaa ja pysyy vielä vakuudessansa, ja sinä yllytit minua häntä hävittämään ilman syytä.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto Satan, Hast thou considered my servant Job, that there is none like him in the earth, a perfect and an upright man, one that feareth God, and escheweth evil? and still he holdeth fast his integrity, although thou movedst me against him, to destroy him without cause.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cui respondens Satan, ait : Pellem pro pelle, et cuncta quæ habet homo dabit pro anima sua ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֧עַן הַשָּׂטָ֛ן אֶת־יְהֹוָ֖ה וַיֹּאמַ֑ר ע֣וֹר בְּעַד־ע֗וֹר וְכֹל֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר לָאִ֔ישׁ יִתֵּ֖ן בְּעַ֥ד נַפְשֽׁוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Satan answered, and said: Skin for skin; and all that a man hath, he will give for his life:
verses.finnish_biblia: Saatana vastasi Herraa ja sanoi: nahka nahasta, ja kaikki, mitä ihmisessä on, antaa hän henkensä edestä.
verses.king_james: And Satan answered the Lord, and said, Skin for skin, yea, all that a man hath will he give for his life.

verses.latin_vulgate: alioquin mitte manum tuam, et tange os ejus et carnem, et tunc videbis quod in faciem benedicat tibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אוּלָם֙ שְֽׁלַֽח־נָ֣א יָֽדְךָ֔ וְגַ֥ע אֶל־עַצְמ֖וֹ וְאֶל־בְּשָׂר֑וֹ אִם־לֹ֥א אֶל־פָּנֶ֖יךָ יְבָרְכֶֽךָּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: But put forth thy hand, and touch his bone and his flesh, and then thou shalt see that he will bless thee to thy face.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta ojenna kätes ja rupee hänen luihinsa ja lihaansa; mitämaks hän luopuu sinusta kasvois edessä.
verses.king_james: But put forth thine hand now, and touch his bone and his flesh, and he will curse thee to thy face.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit ergo Dominus ad Satan : Ecce in manu tua est : verumtamen animam illius serva.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֧אמֶר יְהֹוָ֛ה אֶל־הַשָּׂטָ֖ן הִנּ֣וֹ בְיָדֶ֑ךָ אַ֖ךְ אֶת־נַפְשׁ֥וֹ שְׁמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to Satan: Behold, he is in thy hand, but yet save his life.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra sanoi saatanalle: katso, hän olkoon sinun kädessäs; kuitenkin säästä hänen henkeänsä.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto Satan, Behold, he is in thine hand; but save his life.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egressus igitur Satan a facie Domini, percussit Job ulcere pessimo, a planta pedis usque ad verticem ejus ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּצֵא֙ הַשָּׂטָ֔ן מֵאֵ֖ת פְּנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וַיַּ֤ךְ אֶת־אִיּוֹב֙ בִּשְׁחִ֣ין רָ֔ע מִכַּ֥ף רַגְל֖וֹ (עד) [וְעַ֥ד] קׇדְקֳדֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: So Satan went forth from the presence of the Lord, and struck Job with a very grievous ulcer, from the sole of the foot even to the top of his head:
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin läksi saatana Herran tyköä ja löi Jobin pahoilla paisumilla, hänen kantapäästä kiireesen asti.
verses.king_james: So went Satan forth from the presence of the Lord, and smote Job with sore boils from the sole of his foot unto his crown.

verses.latin_vulgate: qui testa saniem radebat, sedens in sterquilinio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּֽקַּֽח־ל֣וֹ חֶ֔רֶשׂ לְהִתְגָּרֵ֖ד בּ֑וֹ וְה֖וּא יֹשֵׁ֥ב בְּתוֹךְ־הָאֵֽפֶר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he took a potsherd and scraped the corrupt matter, sitting on a dunghill.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän otti saviastian ja kaapi itseänsä sillä, ja istui tuhassa.
verses.king_james: And he took him a potsherd to scrape himself withal; and he sat down among the ashes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit autem illi uxor sua : Adhuc tu permanes in simplicitate tua ? Benedic Deo, et morere.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֹּ֤אמֶר לוֹ֙ אִשְׁתּ֔וֹ עֹדְךָ֖ מַחֲזִ֣יק בְּתֻמָּתֶ֑ךָ בָּרֵ֥ךְ אֱלֹהִ֖ים וָמֻֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And his wife said to him: Dost thou still continue in thy simplicity? bless God and die.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen emäntänsä sanoi hänelle: Vieläkös pysyt vakuudessas? siunaa Jumalaa ja kuole.
verses.king_james: Then said his wife unto him, Dost thou still retain thine integrity? curse God, and die.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui ait ad illam : Quasi una de stultis mulieribus locuta es : si bona suscepimus de manu Dei, mala quare non suscipiamus ? In omnibus his non peccavit Job labiis suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֵלֶ֗יהָ כְּדַבֵּ֞ר אַחַ֤ת הַנְּבָלוֹת֙ תְּדַבֵּ֔רִי גַּ֣ם אֶת־הַטּ֗וֹב נְקַבֵּל֙ מֵאֵ֣ת הָאֱלֹהִ֔ים וְאֶת־הָרָ֖ע לֹ֣א נְקַבֵּ֑ל בְּכׇל־זֹ֛את לֹא־חָטָ֥א אִיּ֖וֹב בִּשְׂפָתָֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And he said to her: Thou hast spoken like one of the foolish women: If we have received good things at the hand of God, why should we not receive evil? In all these things Job did not sin with his lips.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta hän sanoi hänelle: sinä puhut niinkuin tyhmät vaimot puhuvat. Jos me olemme hyvää saaneet Jumalalta, eikö myös meidän pidä ottaman pahaa vastaan? Kaikissa näissä ei Job syntiä tehnyt huulillansa.
verses.king_james: But he said unto her, Thou speakest as one of the foolish women speaketh. What? shall we receive good at the hand of God, and shall we not receive evil? In all this did not Job sin with his lips.

verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur audientes tres amici Job omne malum quod accidisset ei, venerunt singuli de loco suo, Eliphaz Themanites, et Baldad Suhites, et Sophar Naamathites. Condixerant enim ut pariter venientes visitarent eum, et consolarentur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיִּשְׁמְע֞וּ שְׁלֹ֣שֶׁת ׀ רֵעֵ֣י אִיּ֗וֹב אֵ֣ת כׇּל־הָרָעָ֣ה הַזֹּאת֮ הַבָּ֣אָה עָלָיו֒ וַיָּבֹ֙אוּ֙ אִ֣ישׁ מִמְּקֹמ֔וֹ אֱלִיפַ֤ז הַתֵּֽימָנִי֙ וּבִלְדַּ֣ד הַשּׁוּחִ֔י וְצוֹפַ֖ר הַנַּֽעֲמָתִ֑י וַיִּוָּעֲד֣וּ יַחְדָּ֔ו לָב֥וֹא לָנֽוּד־ל֖וֹ וּֽלְנַחֲמֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now when Job's three friends heard all the evil that had befallen him, they came every one from his own place, Eliphaz, the Themanite, and Baldad, the Suhite, and Sophar, the Naamathite. For they had made an appointment to come together and visit him, and comfort him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Jobin kolme ystävää kuulivat kaiken sen onnettomuuden, joka hänelle tullut oli, tulivat he itsekukin paikkakunnastansa: Eliphas Temanista, Bildad Suasta ja Zophar Naemasta, ja kokoontuivat ynnä tulemaan, armahtelemaan ja lohduttamaan häntä.
verses.king_james: Now when Job’s three friends heard of all this evil that was come upon him, they came every one from his own place; Eliphaz the Temanite, and Bildad the Shuhite, and Zophar the Naamathite: for they had made an appointment together to come to mourn with him and to comfort him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque elevassent procul oculos suos, non cognoverunt eum, et exclamantes ploraverunt, scissisque vestibus sparserunt pulverem super caput suum in cælum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׂא֨וּ אֶת־עֵינֵיהֶ֤ם מֵֽרָחוֹק֙ וְלֹ֣א הִכִּירֻ֔הוּ וַיִּשְׂא֥וּ קוֹלָ֖ם וַיִּבְכּ֑וּ וַֽיִּקְרְעוּ֙ אִ֣ישׁ מְעִל֔וֹ וַיִּזְרְק֥וּ עָפָ֛ר עַל־רָאשֵׁיהֶ֖ם הַשָּׁמָֽיְמָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when they had lifted up their eyes afar off, they knew him not, and crying out, they wept, and rending their garments, they sprinkled dust upon their heads toward heaven.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin he nostivat taampaa silmänsä, ei he häntä tunteneet, ja korottivat äänensä ja itkivät; ja jokainen repäisi vaatteensa, ja heittivät tomua päänsä päälle taivasta kohden,
verses.king_james: And when they lifted up their eyes afar off, and knew him not, they lifted up their voice, and wept; and they rent every one his mantle, and sprinkled dust upon their heads toward heaven.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et sederunt cum eo in terra septem diebus et septem noctibus : et nemo loquebatur ei verbum : videbant enim dolorem esse vehementem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּשְׁב֤וּ אִתּוֹ֙ לָאָ֔רֶץ שִׁבְעַ֥ת יָמִ֖ים וְשִׁבְעַ֣ת לֵיל֑וֹת וְאֵין־דֹּבֵ֤ר אֵלָיו֙ דָּבָ֔ר כִּ֣י רָא֔וּ כִּי־גָדַ֥ל הַכְּאֵ֖ב מְאֹֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they sat with him on the ground seven day and seven nights and no man spoke to him a word: for they saw that his grief was very great.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja istuivat hänen kanssansa maan päällä seitsemän päivää ja seitsemän yötä, ja ei sanaakaan hänen kanssansa puhuneet; sillä he näkivät hänen kipunsa sangen suureksi.
verses.king_james: So they sat down with him upon the ground seven days and seven nights, and none spake a word unto him: for they saw that his grief was very great.
